title: ilex cookii
intro: Ilex cookii, also known as the Chinese Holly or Holly-leafed Evergreen, is a species of evergreen shrub native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ilex cookii include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. In herbal preparations, Ilex cookii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
